treatments.title: Specialized Treatments
treatments.desc: We offer targeted therapies for various musculoskeletal conditions to help you return to a pain-free life.

symptomsAccordion.title: Common Symptoms We Treat
symptomsAccordion.desc: Identifying your symptoms accurately is the first step towards a targeted cure. If you experience any of these, specialized chiropractic intervention can help.

items.title: Back Pain
items.desc: Often presents as a shooting, searing, or stabbing pain. The discomfort typically worsens with bending, lifting, standing, or walking.

items.title: Neck Pain
items.desc: Characterized by general stiffness, severe muscle spasms, reduced range of movement, and often accompanied by tension headaches.

items.title: Knee Pain
items.desc: Symptoms include localized stiffness, visible swelling, a feeling of instability or giving way, and sometimes popping or crunching noises.

items.title: Sciatica
items.desc: Distinctive discomfort radiating from the lower back down through the leg. Pain can vary widely from a mild ache to a sharp, burning sensation or excruciating electric shock.

items.title: Slipped Disc
items.desc: Frequently causes numbness, noticeable weakness in the affected area, and persistent tingling or burning sensations radiating along nerve paths.

testimonials.title: Our Valuable Clients
testimonials.desc: Hear from our patients in Patna who have reclaimed their active lives through our dedicated care.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.desc: We're here to help you on your journey to optimal health. Reach out to schedule an appointment or ask any questions about our chiropractic care.

about.title: Premium Healthcare Solutions in Patna
about.subtitle: Advance Chiropractic Clinic
about.desc: Restoring mobility, alleviating pain, and enhancing your quality of life through expert, evidence-based chiropractic care.
about.doctorDesc1: Dr. Surendra Kumar brings years of specialized experience in diagnosing and treating neuromuscular disorders, with an emphasis on treatment through manual adjustment and/or manipulation of the spine.
about.doctorDesc2: Committed to a patient-centric philosophy, Dr. Kumar believes in treating the root cause of discomfort rather than merely masking symptoms. His approach integrates advanced chiropractic techniques with holistic wellness strategies, ensuring comprehensive care tailored to individual patient needs.
about.missionSubtitle: Providing a tranquil, state-of-the-art environment designed for your healing and comfort.
about.missionDesc: To deliver premium healthcare solutions that empower our patients to lead pain-free, active lives. We are dedicated to clinical excellence and compassionate care in every interaction.
about.facilityDesc: Located in the heart of Patna, our clinic is equipped with the latest diagnostic and therapeutic technology. We maintain strict hygiene protocols and a calming atmosphere to ensure your visit is as comfortable as it is effective.

services.title: Targeted Physiotherapy for Active Living
services.desc: Our evidence-based physiotherapy services are designed to diagnose, treat, and prevent structural and functional disorders of the body. Experience a clinical approach to pain relief, mobility, and recovery.
services.sectionDesc: We provide a comprehensive range of clinical physiotherapy treatments customized to meet your healing and movement goals.
services.ctaDesc: Schedule a comprehensive initial assessment. Our team will design a personalized recovery plan tailored to your condition.

items.title: Cardiac Rehabilitation
items.desc: A customized program of exercise and education designed to help you recover after a heart attack, heart surgery, or other cardiac condition.

items.title: Musculoskeletal Physiotherapy
items.desc: Specialized care for restoring mobility, strength, and function to joints, muscles, ligaments, and tendons.

items.title: Vestibular Rehabilitation
items.desc: Targeted exercise programs to alleviate dizziness, balance problems, and vertigo issues related to the inner ear.

items.title: Pre & Post Surgery Rehabilitation
items.desc: Tailored physical therapy to prepare your body for surgery and optimize recovery, restoring full range of motion post-operation.

items.title: Women's Health Physiotherapy
items.desc: Compassionate pelvic floor rehab and support for pre-natal, post-natal, and other gender-specific health conditions.

items.title: Sports Physiotherapy
items.desc: Focused injury rehabilitation and athletic performance training to help you safely return to sport and prevent future issues.

items.title: Pediatric Physiotherapy
items.desc: Gentle, play-based therapeutic exercises to support children's physical development, coordination, and motor skills.

items.title: Geriatric Physiotherapy
items.desc: Focused mobility and strength training to manage arthritis, balance loss, and keep seniors active, safe, and independent.

items.title: Neuro Physiotherapy
items.desc: Expert rehabilitation for patients recovering from stroke, Parkinson's, Multiple Sclerosis, paralysis, or spinal cord injuries.

items.title: Home Care Physiotherapy
items.desc: Dedicated professional physiotherapy assessments and treatment programs brought directly to the convenience of your home.

therapy.title: Therapies
therapy.desc: Have a glance at the therapies we provide.
therapy.featuredDesc: Discover our specialized treatment programs designed to accelerate recovery and restore optimal function.
therapy.manyMoreDesc: A wide array of evidence-based treatments tailored to your specific recovery needs.

items.title: Post-COVID Physiotherapy
items.desc: Comprehensive respiratory and physical rehabilitation programs to help patients regain strength and lung capacity following COVID-19.

items.title: Shockwave Physiotherapy
items.desc: Advanced non-invasive treatment utilizing acoustic waves to promote healing in subacute, subchronic, and chronic conditions.

items.title: Chest Physiotherapy
items.desc: Specialized airway clearance techniques and breathing exercises to improve respiratory function and clear lung secretions.

items.title: Cryotherapy (Cold Therapy)
items.desc: Targeted cold therapy designed to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote faster recovery from acute injuries.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Physical Therapy
items.desc: Specialized treatments to address dysfunction, pain, and weakness in the pelvic region, improving core stability and control.

items.title: Traction Therapy
items.desc: Gentle decompression techniques to relieve pressure on the spine and alleviate nerve pain or disc-related discomfort.

items.title: Soft Tissue Mobilization
items.desc: Hands-on techniques focused on muscles, ligaments, and fascia to break down scar tissue and enhance flexibility.

items.title: Myofascial Release (MFR)
items.desc: Targeted sustained pressure to relieve tension in the connective tissues (fascia), reducing pain and restoring motion.

items.title: Acupuncture
items.desc: Traditional and contemporary acupuncture methods to stimulate the nervous system, alleviate pain, and promote natural healing.

symptoms.desc: Symptoms and conditions of each issue may vary from one another.
symptoms.ctaTitle: Are you suffering from any of these conditions?
symptoms.ctaDesc: Our clinic provides comprehensive assessments and tailored chiropractic adjustments alongside active physiotherapy protocols to aid your path back to comfort.
